steps: File NTA Form 11 refund application for JPY 119,850 overpaid withholding tax on Nintendo dividend
Submit Norwegian tax residency certificate to prove eligibility for JP-NO treaty 10% rate
Contact MUFG Custody to initiate withholding tax reclaim process for account 2401234567
Provide ISIN JP3902900004 transaction details and treaty rate documentation to support claim

references.title: NTA – Refund of Overpaid Withholding Tax (Form 11)
